g.text: The Hospital class coordinates object relationships.
It stores employees and patients, then delegates treatment,
care, and discharge to the concrete employee objects.
Abstract base class shared by all employees.
It holds common identity data and the list of hospitals.
Doctors manage their own patient list and set the reverse
Nurses track the patients they care for and update the
Patient keeps the inverse links to one Doctor and many Nurses.
discharge() removes the patient from both sides.
- polymorphism when Hospital accepts Doctor or Nurse-specific actions
- bidirectional associations to keep the model consistent
